parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.id as user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.is_active,
  COALESCE(m.status::text, 'none') as membership_status,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(up.onboarding_completed, false) THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END as onboarding_completed,
  CASE WHEN up.user_id IS NOT NULL AND up.goal IS NOT NULL THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END as profile_saved,
  CASE WHEN u.phone_number IS NOT NULL AND u.phone_number != '' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END as phone_provided
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN memberships m ON m.user_id = u.id AND m.status = 'active' AND m.expires_at > NOW()
LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.telegram_id = $1
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO users (telegram_id, first_name, last_name, username, language_code)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
ON CONFLICT (telegram_id) DO UPDATE SET
  first_name   = CASE
                   WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(users.first_name)) <= 1 THEN EXCLUDED.first_name
                   ELSE users.first_name
                 END,
  last_name    = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.last_name, users.last_name),
  username     = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.username, users.username),
  updated_at   = NOW()
RETURNING id, telegram_id, first_name

parameters.text: =Hola {{ $('Set User Context').item.json.firstName }}! No tienes una membresia activa. Para acceder al asistente FitAI contacta al administrador.

options.systemMessage:
=Eres FitAI y estas completando el perfil de salud de {{ $('Check User & Membership').item.json.first_name }}.

CONTEXTO: El usuario necesita completar su perfil antes de acceder al asistente completo. Recopila la informacion de forma conversacional, un dato a la vez.

{{ $('Load Onboarding Progress').item.json.last_step > 0 ? '⚠️ RETOMANDO SESION PREVIA: El usuario ya respondio ' + $('Load Onboarding Progress').item.json.last_step + ' de 20 preguntas. Revisa el historial de esta conversacion y continua desde la siguiente pregunta pendiente. NO repitas preguntas ya respondidas.' : 'Empieza desde la pregunta 1.' }}

INFORMACION A RECOPILAR (en este orden):
1. Objetivo principal: bajar de peso / ganar musculo / mantener / recomposicion
2. Genero (para calculos metabolicos): masculino / femenino
3. Edad (anos)
4. Altura (cm)
5. Peso actual (kg)
6. Nivel de actividad: sedentario / poco activo / moderadamente activo / muy activo / extremadamente activo
7. Nivel de fitness: principiante / intermedio / avanzado
8. Restricciones dieteticas (vegetariano, vegano, sin gluten, etc.) o 'ninguna'
9. Alergias alimentarias o 'ninguna'
10. Alimentos que no le gustan o 'ninguno'
11. Lesiones o condiciones fisicas a considerar o 'ninguna'
12. Equipamiento disponible para ejercicio o 'ninguno / solo casa'
13. Dias de entrenamiento por semana (1-7)
14. Numero de comidas al dia preferidas (2-6)
15. Horario de comidas (desayuno/comida/cena aproximados)
16. Cultura gastronomica (mexicana, colombiana, espanola, etc.)
17. Presupuesto para ingredientes: economico / moderado / sin restriccion
18. Pais de residencia (ej: Colombia, Mexico, Espana)
19. Ciudad de residencia
20. Numero de documento de identidad (cedula, DNI, pasaporte) — opcional, puedes indicar 'prefiero no dar'

FLUJO DE CIERRE (MUY IMPORTANTE — sigue este orden exacto):
PASO 1: Cuando tengas los 20 datos, presenta un resumen y pregunta "¿Todo correcto o deseas cambiar algo?"
PASO 2: Si el usuario confirma que esta correcto (dice si, correcto, listo, ok, etc.):
  - Escribe tu mensaje de bienvenida al asistente
  - INMEDIATAMENTE despues, en el MISMO mensaje, agrega el bloque [PERFIL_COMPLETO] con todos los datos
  - Este es el unico momento en que debes incluir el bloque

El bloque debe tener este formato exacto:
[PERFIL_COMPLETO]
{"objetivo": "...", "genero": "male|female", "edad": 0, "altura_cm": 0, "peso_kg": 0, "actividad": "sedentary|lightly_active|moderately_active|very_active|extra_active", "fitness": "beginner|intermediate|advanced", "restricciones": [], "alergias": [], "disgustos": [], "lesiones": [], "equipamiento": [], "dias_entrenamiento": 0, "comidas_dia": 0, "cultura": "...", "presupuesto": "low|medium|high", "pais": "...", "ciudad": "...", "documento": "..."}
[/PERFIL_COMPLETO]

REGLAS:
- Responde en espanol
- Se amigable y motivador
- Si el usuario responde algo ambiguo, pide clarificacion
- NO incluyas el bloque [PERFIL_COMPLETO] en el resumen ni en ningun mensaje previo a la confirmacion
- El bloque [PERFIL_COMPLETO] nunca es visible para el usuario — es una senal interna del sistema

parameters.query: INSERT INTO user_profiles (user_id, gender, age, height_cm, weight_kg, activity_level, fitness_level, goal, dietary_restrictions, food_allergies, disliked_foods, injuries, available_equipment, training_days_per_week, meal_count, local_culture, budget_level, onboarding_completed) VALUES ($1, $2::gender_type, $3, $4, $5, $6::activity_level, $7::fitness_level, $8::goal_type, ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($9::jsonb)), ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($10::jsonb)), ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($11::jsonb)), ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($12::jsonb)), ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($13::jsonb)), $14, $15, $16, $17::budget_level, false) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET gender = EXCLUDED.gender, age = EXCLUDED.age, height_cm = EXCLUDED.height_cm, weight_kg = EXCLUDED.weight_kg, activity_level = EXCLUDED.activity_level, fitness_level = EXCLUDED.fitness_level, goal = EXCLUDED.goal, dietary_restrictions = EXCLUDED.dietary_restrictions, food_allergies = EXCLUDED.food_allergies, disliked_foods = EXCLUDED.disliked_foods, injuries = EXCLUDED.injuries, available_equipment = EXCLUDED.available_equipment, training_days_per_week = EXCLUDED.training_days_per_week, meal_count = EXCLUDED.meal_count, local_culture = EXCLUDED.local_culture, budget_level = EXCLUDED.budget_level, updated_at = NOW()

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Parse Profile').item.json.userId, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.gender, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.age, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.height_cm, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.weight_kg, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.activity_level, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.fitness_level, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.goal, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.dietary_restrictions, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.food_allergies, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.disliked_foods, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.injuries, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.available_equipment, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.training_days_per_week, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.meal_count, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.local_culture, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.budget_level] }}

parameters.query:
SELECT id, first_name, true::boolean AS migration_match
FROM users
WHERE migration_token = UPPER(TRIM($1))
  AND migration_token_expires_at > NOW()
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL::integer, NULL::text, false::boolean
LIMIT 1
UPDATE users SET telegram_id = $1,     migration_token = NULL,     migration_token_expires_at = NULL,     updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $2 RETURNING first_name

parameters.text:
=✅ *¡Migración completada!*

Tu cuenta de FitAI ha sido vinculada a este Telegram. Todo tu historial, perfil y membresía están disponibles. Escríbeme cuando quieras continuar.

parameters.query:
SELECT answers, last_step FROM onboarding_progress WHERE user_id = $1
UNION ALL
SELECT '{}'::jsonb, 0
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO onboarding_progress (user_id, answers, last_step, updated_at)
VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb, $3, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET
  answers    = EXCLUDED.answers,
  last_step  = EXCLUDED.last_step,
  updated_at = NOW()
DELETE FROM onboarding_progress WHERE user_id = $1
UPDATE user_profiles SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = $1

parameters.value:
📱 Aún necesito tu número de teléfono para completar tu registro.

Presiona el botón de abajo para compartirlo.

parameters.name: reply_markup
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ keyboard: [[{ text: '📱 Compartir mi número', request_contact: true }]], resize_keyboard: true, one_time_keyboard: true }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE user_profiles SET onboarding_completed = true, onboarding_completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE telegram_id = $1)

SELECT
  up.user_id, u.first_name,
  up.caloric_target, up.protein_target_g, up.carb_target_g, up.fat_target_g,
  up.weight_kg, up.height_cm, up.age, up.gender, up.activity_level,
  up.goal AS goal_type, up.wake_up_time, up.training_days_per_week,
  up.onboarding_completed, up.tdee, up.bmr,
  g.goal_type AS active_goal_type, g.target_weight, g.start_weight, g.start_date
FROM users u
JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN goals g ON g.user_id = u.id AND g.is_active = true
WHERE u.id = $1;

SELECT
  caloric_target, protein_target_g, carb_target_g, fat_target_g,
  COALESCE(calories_consumed, 0) AS calories_consumed,
  COALESCE(protein_consumed_g, 0) AS protein_consumed_g,
  COALESCE(carbs_consumed_g, 0) AS carbs_consumed_g,
  COALESCE(fat_consumed_g, 0) AS fat_consumed_g,
  COALESCE(meals_logged, 0) AS meals_logged,
  target_date
FROM daily_targets
WHERE user_id = $1 AND target_date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  description AS food_name, meal_type,
  estimated_calories AS calories,
  estimated_protein_g AS protein_g,
  estimated_carbs_g AS carbs_g,
  estimated_fat_g AS fat_g,
  logged_at
FROM daily_intake_logs
WHERE user_id = $1 AND log_date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date
ORDER BY logged_at DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT plan_json, plan_date
FROM meal_plans
WHERE user_id = $1
  AND plan_date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date
  AND is_active = true
LIMIT 1

SELECT weight_kg, logged_at::date AS record_date
FROM weight_logs
WHERE user_id = $1
ORDER BY logged_at DESC
LIMIT 7

SELECT
  ROUND(AVG(calories_consumed)::numeric, 0) AS avg_calories,
  ROUND(AVG(protein_consumed_g)::numeric, 1) AS avg_protein,
  COUNT(*) AS days_tracked
FROM daily_targets
WHERE user_id = $1
  AND target_date >= (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND calories_consumed > 0

parameters.name: log_food_intake
parameters.description: Registra un alimento consumido por el usuario en su log diario. Usa esta tool cuando el usuario mencione que comio, consumio, tomo o ingirió algo. Pasa la informacion como JSON string en el campo 'query' con este formato exacto: {"food_name": "nombre del alimento", "meal_type": "breakfast|lunch|dinner|snack", "calories": 350, "protein_g": 25, "carbs_g": 30, "fat_g": 8, "log_date": "YYYY-MM-DD"}. log_date es OBLIGATORIO — determina la fecha segun lo que diga el usuario: si habla de 'hoy' o no especifica → usa la fecha de hoy del CONTEXTO DEL USUARIO; si dice 'ayer' o 'anoche' → usa la fecha de ayer (hoy - 1 dia); si menciona un dia de la semana → calcula la fecha pasada correspondiente. Si el usuario no menciona calorias, estimaras razonablemente. meal_type: breakfast=desayuno, lunch=almuerzo, dinner=cena, snack=merienda.

parameters.name: get_daily_status
parameters.description: Obtiene el resumen detallado del estado nutricional del usuario para hoy: calorías consumidas vs objetivo, macros (proteína, carbohidratos, grasas), lista de alimentos registrados y porcentaje de cumplimiento. Usa esta tool cuando el usuario pregunte cómo va su día, qué ha comido, cuántas calorías le quedan, o pida un resumen de su día.

parameters.toolDescription:
Base de conocimiento experta en nutricion, fitness, entrenamiento, suplementacion, habitos saludables, psicologia del cambio, y estrategias de coaching. Consultar SIEMPRE que el usuario:
- Pregunte algo tecnico sobre nutricion, ejercicio o suplementos
- Se sienta estancado, en meseta, o sin progreso (hay protocolos especificos para romper mesetas)
- Necesite ayuda para crear habitos o mantener consistencia (hay tecnicas como habit stacking)
- Pregunte sobre ritmos seguros de perdida o ganancia de peso
- Pregunte sobre tipos de entrenamiento, volumen, frecuencia o deload
- Exprese frustracion con su proceso (hay estrategias de coaching basadas en evidencia)
- Pregunte por metricas de salud como IMC, porcentaje de grasa corporal, metabolismo basal o TDEE (hay tablas de rangos, clasificaciones y acciones recomendadas)
- Necesite interpretar cualquier indicador numerico de su progreso

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO conversation_logs (user_id, message_type, message_text)
VALUES ($1, 'text', $2)
RETURNING id

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Check User & Membership').first().json.user_id, ($('Set User Context').first().json.message && $('Set User Context').first().json.message.text) ? $('Set User Context').first().json.message.text : '[no text]'] }}

parameters.query: SELECT id as user_id FROM users WHERE telegram_id = $1

SELECT
  u.id as user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.is_active,
  COALESCE(m.status::text, 'none') as membership_status,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(up.onboarding_completed, false) THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END as onboarding_completed,
  CASE WHEN up.user_id IS NOT NULL AND up.goal IS NOT NULL THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END as profile_saved,
  CASE WHEN u.phone_number IS NOT NULL AND u.phone_number != '' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END as phone_provided
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN memberships m ON m.user_id = u.id AND m.status = 'active' AND m.expires_at > NOW()
LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.telegram_id = $1
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO users (telegram_id, first_name, last_name, username, language_code)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
ON CONFLICT (telegram_id) DO UPDATE SET
  first_name   = CASE
                   WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(users.first_name)) <= 1 THEN EXCLUDED.first_name
                   ELSE users.first_name
                 END,
  last_name    = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.last_name, users.last_name),
  username     = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.username, users.username),
  updated_at   = NOW()
RETURNING id, telegram_id, first_name

parameters.query: INSERT INTO user_profiles (user_id, gender, age, height_cm, weight_kg, activity_level, fitness_level, goal, dietary_restrictions, food_allergies, disliked_foods, injuries, available_equipment, training_days_per_week, meal_count, local_culture, budget_level, onboarding_completed) VALUES ($1, $2::gender_type, $3, $4, $5, $6::activity_level, $7::fitness_level, $8::goal_type, ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($9::jsonb)), ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($10::jsonb)), ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($11::jsonb)), ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($12::jsonb)), ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($13::jsonb)), $14, $15, $16, $17::budget_level, false) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET gender = EXCLUDED.gender, age = EXCLUDED.age, height_cm = EXCLUDED.height_cm, weight_kg = EXCLUDED.weight_kg, activity_level = EXCLUDED.activity_level, fitness_level = EXCLUDED.fitness_level, goal = EXCLUDED.goal, dietary_restrictions = EXCLUDED.dietary_restrictions, food_allergies = EXCLUDED.food_allergies, disliked_foods = EXCLUDED.disliked_foods, injuries = EXCLUDED.injuries, available_equipment = EXCLUDED.available_equipment, training_days_per_week = EXCLUDED.training_days_per_week, meal_count = EXCLUDED.meal_count, local_culture = EXCLUDED.local_culture, budget_level = EXCLUDED.budget_level, updated_at = NOW()

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Parse Profile').item.json.userId, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.gender, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.age, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.height_cm, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.weight_kg, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.activity_level, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.fitness_level, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.goal, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.dietary_restrictions, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.food_allergies, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.disliked_foods, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.injuries, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.available_equipment, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.training_days_per_week, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.meal_count, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.local_culture, $('Parse Profile').item.json.profile.budget_level] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE users SET country = $1, city = $2, document_number = $3, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $4

Presiona el botón para compartirlo de forma segura.

parameters.query:
SELECT id, first_name, true::boolean AS migration_match
FROM users
WHERE migration_token = UPPER(TRIM($1))
  AND migration_token_expires_at > NOW()
UNION ALL
SELECT NULL::integer, NULL::text, false::boolean
LIMIT 1
UPDATE users SET telegram_id = $1,     migration_token = NULL,     migration_token_expires_at = NULL,     updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $2 RETURNING first_name

parameters.text:
=✅ *¡Migración completada!*

Tu cuenta de FitAI ha sido vinculada a este Telegram. Todo tu historial, perfil y membresía están disponibles. Escríbeme cuando quieras continuar.

parameters.query:
SELECT answers, last_step FROM onboarding_progress WHERE user_id = $1
UNION ALL
SELECT '{}'::jsonb, 0
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO onboarding_progress (user_id, answers, last_step, updated_at)
VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb, $3, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET
  answers    = EXCLUDED.answers,
  last_step  = EXCLUDED.last_step,
  updated_at = NOW()
DELETE FROM onboarding_progress WHERE user_id = $1
UPDATE user_profiles SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = $1

Presiona el botón de abajo para compartirlo.

parameters.query: UPDATE user_profiles SET onboarding_completed = true, onboarding_completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE telegram_id = $1)

SELECT
  up.user_id, u.first_name,
  up.caloric_target, up.protein_target_g, up.carb_target_g, up.fat_target_g,
  up.weight_kg, up.height_cm, up.age, up.gender, up.activity_level,
  up.goal AS goal_type, up.wake_up_time, up.training_days_per_week,
  up.onboarding_completed, up.tdee, up.bmr,
  g.goal_type AS active_goal_type, g.target_weight, g.start_weight, g.start_date
FROM users u
JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN goals g ON g.user_id = u.id AND g.is_active = true
WHERE u.id = $1;

SELECT
  caloric_target, protein_target_g, carb_target_g, fat_target_g,
  COALESCE(calories_consumed, 0) AS calories_consumed,
  COALESCE(protein_consumed_g, 0) AS protein_consumed_g,
  COALESCE(carbs_consumed_g, 0) AS carbs_consumed_g,
  COALESCE(fat_consumed_g, 0) AS fat_consumed_g,
  COALESCE(meals_logged, 0) AS meals_logged,
  target_date
FROM daily_targets
WHERE user_id = $1 AND target_date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date
LIMIT 1

SELECT
  description AS food_name, meal_type,
  estimated_calories AS calories,
  estimated_protein_g AS protein_g,
  estimated_carbs_g AS carbs_g,
  estimated_fat_g AS fat_g,
  logged_at
FROM daily_intake_logs
WHERE user_id = $1 AND log_date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date
ORDER BY logged_at DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT plan_json, plan_date
FROM meal_plans
WHERE user_id = $1
  AND plan_date = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date
  AND is_active = true
LIMIT 1

SELECT weight_kg, logged_at::date AS record_date
FROM weight_logs
WHERE user_id = $1
ORDER BY logged_at DESC
LIMIT 7

SELECT
  ROUND(AVG(calories_consumed)::numeric, 0) AS avg_calories,
  ROUND(AVG(protein_consumed_g)::numeric, 1) AS avg_protein,
  COUNT(*) AS days_tracked
FROM daily_targets
WHERE user_id = $1
  AND target_date >= (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota')::date - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND calories_consumed > 0

parameters.name: log_food_intake
parameters.description: Registra un alimento consumido por el usuario en su log diario. Usa esta tool cuando el usuario mencione que comio, consumio, tomo o ingirió algo. Pasa la informacion como JSON string en el campo 'query' con este formato exacto: {"food_name": "nombre del alimento", "meal_type": "breakfast|lunch|dinner|snack", "calories": 350, "protein_g": 25, "carbs_g": 30, "fat_g": 8, "log_date": "YYYY-MM-DD"}. log_date es OBLIGATORIO — determina la fecha segun lo que diga el usuario: si habla de 'hoy' o no especifica → usa la fecha de hoy del CONTEXTO DEL USUARIO; si dice 'ayer' o 'anoche' → usa la fecha de ayer (hoy - 1 dia); si menciona un dia de la semana → calcula la fecha pasada correspondiente. Si el usuario no menciona calorias, estimaras razonablemente. meal_type: breakfast=desayuno, lunch=almuerzo, dinner=cena, snack=merienda.

parameters.name: get_daily_status
parameters.description: Obtiene el resumen detallado del estado nutricional del usuario para hoy: calorías consumidas vs objetivo, macros (proteína, carbohidratos, grasas), lista de alimentos registrados y porcentaje de cumplimiento. Usa esta tool cuando el usuario pregunte cómo va su día, qué ha comido, cuántas calorías le quedan, o pida un resumen de su día.

parameters.toolDescription:
Base de conocimiento experta en nutricion, fitness, entrenamiento, suplementacion, habitos saludables, psicologia del cambio, y estrategias de coaching. Consultar SIEMPRE que el usuario:
- Pregunte algo tecnico sobre nutricion, ejercicio o suplementos
- Se sienta estancado, en meseta, o sin progreso (hay protocolos especificos para romper mesetas)
- Necesite ayuda para crear habitos o mantener consistencia (hay tecnicas como habit stacking)
- Pregunte sobre ritmos seguros de perdida o ganancia de peso
- Pregunte sobre tipos de entrenamiento, volumen, frecuencia o deload
- Exprese frustracion con su proceso (hay estrategias de coaching basadas en evidencia)
- Pregunte por metricas de salud como IMC, porcentaje de grasa corporal, metabolismo basal o TDEE (hay tablas de rangos, clasificaciones y acciones recomendadas)
- Necesite interpretar cualquier indicador numerico de su progreso

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO conversation_logs (user_id, message_type, message_text)
VALUES ($1, 'text', $2)
RETURNING id
